= Contents =
  - [[#DATABASES|DATABASES]]
    - [[#DATABASES#postgress|postgress]]
        - [[#DATABASES#postgress#pgcli connect|pgcli connect]]
    - [[#DATABASES#sql|sql]]
      - [[#DATABASES#sql#modification|modification]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#modification#insert values|insert values]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#modification#update part of the value|update part of the value]]
      - [[#DATABASES#sql#queries|queries]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#queries#delete values|delete values]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#queries#filter values|filter values]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#queries#limit query|limit query]]
        - [[#DATABASES#sql#queries#sort order|sort order]]

= DATABASES =

== postgress ==

==== pgcli connect ====
{{{
  pgcli -h localhost -u postgres
}}}
 
== sql ==

=== modification ===

==== insert values ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
   INSERT INTO table (col1, col2) VALUES (val1, val2);
}}}
==== update part of the value ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
  UPDATE table SET value = REPLACE(value, 'which', 'whith') WHERE condition;
}}}

=== queries ===

==== delete values ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
  DELETE FROM table WHERE condition;
}}}
==== filter values ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table WHERE string IN (value1, value2,...);
}}}
==== limit query ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table LIMIT num;
}}}
==== sort order ====
{{{class="brush: sql"
  SELECT * FROM table ORDER BY id asc/desc;
}}}
